name: INVENTIVA SA
summary: INVENTIVA SA is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of oral small molecule therapies for diseases with significant unmet medical needs, particularly in the areas of NASH (nonalcoholic steatohepatitis) and other fibrotic diseases. Their research and development efforts are centered on developing therapies that target specific pathways involved in the pathogenesis of these diseases. Inventiva SA is headquartered in Daix, France.
